title: Epic Fight - Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword
description:
*EPIC FIGHT COMPATIBLE VERSION*
A mod inspired by Zelda - Skyward Sword, A Link to the Past and Ocarina of Time.
Embark on a journey across the lands to find the Goddess Sword.
Adventure on to unlock its true potential as the Master Sword.
body:
*** ![ZLotMS-header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_header.webp) =================================================================================================================== # **_EPIC FIGHT COMPATIBLE VERSION_** ![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) __**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**__ #### __IF EXPERIENCING ANY PROBLEMS AFTER UPDATING FROM A PREVIOUS VERSION,__ THEN DELETE YOUR MASTERSWORD COMMON CONFIG FILE *** ![ZLotMS-overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_about.webp) *** ### This mod is inspired mainly by Skyward Sword, A Link to the Past and Ocarina of Time, being a mix mash of elements across those and other various Zelda games.  #### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/912522/description_b4811218-f179-480f-80d3-a6efe94d5c27.gif) *** ![ZLotMS-about](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_overview.webp) =================================================================================================================== *** _In an abandoned long lost Temple, seemingly untouched by time, the great Goddess Hylia left a gift for man. Waiting to be claimed by a Hero, the Legendary Goddess Sword sleeps._ _You may embark on a journey across the overworld to collect the three Sacred Flames, to upgrade and unlock the Goddess Sword's potential. Upon infusing the Legendary Blade with the essences of Courage, Wisdom and Power, it becomes the Master Sword, gaining Link's signature spin attack special ability, that is also further improved as you still increase the power of the Master Sword._ *** ⚔️ ⚔️ **Iconic Swords** – From the **Goddess Sword** to the **Fierce Deity Blade**, including multiple variants of the **Master Sword**. 🛡️ **Defensive Tools** – Craft the **Hylian Shield**, restore the **Fighter's Shield**, upgrade them, discover their **unique effects** and **more**. 🧚 **Fairy Companions** – Collect and travel with unique fairies like **Navi, Tatl, Tael, Leaf, Neri, Ciela**, and more—each with **distinct gameplay effects**. 🎵 **Ocarina of Time** – Craft the **Fairy Ocarina** or find the **Ocarina of Time**. Play songs to summon your steed, change the weather, heal, and more. 🪝 **Hookshots, Longshots,** even a **Hypershot and Endershot?!** – Grappling tools with unique mechanics and upgrades. 🔮 **Magic System** – Use items that consume and restore **Magic Energy**, with powerful passive effects and active abilities. 🌀 **Boomerangs, Bombs, Bottles, and More** – Collect and craft classic Zelda tools. 🏰 **World Generation & Structures** – Discover **shrines, fairy fountains,** _dungeons(coming soon)_, and other secrets across the world. 🧱 **New Materials & Crafting** – Mine and forge with a new **mysterious** **ore** and other materials unique to the mod. 🧝 **Supporter Content** – Unlock the exclusive **Sheikah** **Fairy** with a unique defensive Sheikah Vanish passive ability as a token of gratitude for donating or supporting the mod! _Sheikah Fairy_ ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/912522/description_ad58efd5-08a7-4e80-b78b-00b40e19b9c3.gif) 💖 Support this mod and unlock exclusive content like the \*\*Sheikah Fairy\*\*! \- 🌟 Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/MeziMods \- ☕ Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/mezimaru \- 🛍️ Discord Shop: https://discord.com/channels/1197917238091579572/shop

And that’s just the beginning — with **dozens of new items**, gameplay systems, and secrets to uncover, _The Legend of the Master Sword_ offers a deep and replayable Zelda-inspired experience inside Minecraft. #### Materials have Vanilla uses to stay relevant outside of this specific Mod. #### _The swords do not vanish if or when broken_ #### ![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) **Requires playerAnimator mod and its associated dependencies. Requires GeckoLib** **Compatible with Better Combat**   *** **![ZLotMS-spoilers](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_spoilers.webp)** ======================================================================================================================== ***   **📗 Fairy Spawn Locations**
Show List - **Healing Fairy** – Near Fairy Fountains - **Green Fairy** – Various Forest Biomes - **Brown Fairy** – Various Desert Biomes - **Lime Fairy** – Various Jungle Biomes - **Orange Fairy** – Swamp Biomes - **Cyan Fairy** – Various Water Biomes - **Magenta Fairy** – Cherry Grove Biomes - **Gray Fairy** – Basalt Deltas Biome - **Purple** – The End - **White** – The End - **Black** – The End - **Navi** – Rarely found around the Temple of Time - **Tatl** – Rarely found in Plains Biomes when raining - **Tael** – Rarely found in Plains Biomes when raining - **Ciela** – Crafted from combining any two non-unique fairies - **Leaf** – Rarely found anywhere in The Nether - **Neri** – Rarely found in Cold Biomes at night - **Golden Fairy** – Secret Ritual requiring all 16 different fairy companions - **Sheikah Fairy** – Unique Special Fairy only awarded to donors, supporters, and contributors
--- **🎼 Ocarina - Songs & Effects**
Show List - **Song of Time** – Teleports the player to their spawn point if valid. - **Epona's Song** – *Overworld only*: Summons a tame horse. Replaying summons or teleports Epona. (Try using your Hookshot on Epona) - **Zelda's Lullaby** – Heals nearby non-hostile entities, highlights red Fairies, resets Lon Lon Cow milk, and is required for the Golden Fairy. - **Song of Storms** – Changes the weather. - **Sun's Song** – Changes the time of day.
--- **⚒️ Crafting Recipes**
Show List **Smithing Table** - **Goddess Longsword** = Goddess Sword + Farore's Flame + Emerald - **White Goddess Sword** = Goddess Longsword + Nayru's Flame + Block of Lapis - **Master Sword** = White Goddess Sword + Din's Flame + Diamond - **Tempered Master Sword** = Master Sword + Blaze Rod + Kakariko Dwarven Alloy - **Golden Master Sword** = Tempered Master Sword + Bottle o' Enchanting + The Triforce - **Fierce Deity Sword** = Golden Master Sword + Nether Star + End Rod **Crafting Table** - **Hylian Shield** = Diamond + Shield + 2x Mysterious Scrap + Iron Ingot - **Kakariko Dwarven Alloy** = 9x Mysterious Scrap - **9x Mysterious Scrap** = Kakariko Dwarven Alloy - **Netherite Ingot** = Kakariko Dwarven Alloy + Diamond + Iron Ingot + Copper Ingot + Gold Ingot + Emerald - **Temple of Time Music Disc** = Farore's Flame + Nayru's Flame + Din's Flame - **Lingering Luck Potion** = Farore's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Lingering Swiftness Potion** = Nayru's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Lingering Regen Potion** = Din's Flame + Glass Bottle - **Hylian Bottle** = Glass Bottle - **Ciela** = Any two non-unique fairies - **Triforce of Courage** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x Emerald + Farore's Flame - **Triforce of Wisdom** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x Diamond + Nayru's Flame - **Triforce of Power** = 4x Mysterious Scrap + 4x End Crystal + Din's Flame - **The Triforce** = Triforce of Power + Triforce of Wisdom + Triforce of Courage - **Sword Shrine** = 4x Stone Blocks - **Longshot** = Kakariko Alloy + 2x Crying Obsidian + Chain + Hookshot - **Hypershot** = Kakariko Alloy + 2x Piston + Din's Flame + Longshot - **Endershot** = 2x Ender Pearl + 2x End Stone + Hookshot - **Fairy Ocarina** = Emerald + 3x Clay blocks
--- **🏹 How to obtain the Fairy Bow**
Show - **Place a normal Bow in a Sword Shrine and empower it with a Fairy in a Bottle.**
--- **🗡️ How to obtain the True Master Sword**
Show - **Place a Golden Master Sword in a Sword Shrine and empower it with a Blessed Nether Star.** *(True Master Sword can cleanse zombie villagers)*
--- **🌟 How to obtain the Blessed Nether Star**
Show - **In the End, present a Nether Star to a Sword Shrine. Survive.**
--- **🌍 Locations for Structures, Items, Ore, Generations, etc**
Show List - **Goddess Sword** – Found in a Temple in forests, plains, and rare biomes - **Farore's Flame** – Found in a Maze in plains and dense biomes - **Nayru's Flame** – Found in a Shrine in cold biomes (including cold oceans) - **Din's Flame** – Found in an Arena in hot/dry biomes and jungles - **Boomerang** – Rare drop from Skeletons/Pillagers or traded from Goron Merchant - **Fire Rod** – Semi-rare in Bastion/Nether Fortress treasure - **Ice Rod** – Common in Ocean Monuments, rare in Igloos - **Hookshot** – Traded by the Goron Merchant (Try it on Epona!) - **Mysterious Scrap** – Rare from mining Kakariko Ore in the Nether (similar to Ancient Debris), Piglin Brutes, fortress/bastion chests, or rarely via fishing - **Ocarina of Time** – Rare in dungeon chests, buried treasure, woodland mansions, desert pyramids, stronghold libraries, and fishing - **Fairy in a Bottle** – Right-click a red Healing Fairy with an empty Hylian Bottle. Also found in End Cities and Bastion chests - **Sheet Music – Zelda's Lullaby** – 0.1% drop from any mob killed by player - **Sheet Music – Epona's Song** – Found in Lon Lon Ranch (plains, savanna) - **Sheet Music – Song of Storms** – Found in a Windmill (plains, swamps) - **Sheet Music – Sun's Song** – Found inside desert pyramids
--- **🧩 Nayru's Shrine – Riddles & Solutions**
Show Riddles - I take to the wind, soar in the sky, Lay your head on me, close your eyes. – **_Feather_** - At night in the dark, I provide a guiding light, Twinkling from afar, in the sky's vast height. – **_Torch_** - A vessel of knowledge, with pages to read, In a library's silence, is where you'll find me. – **_Book_** - In the heart of the desert, where the sun's heat does blaze, I'm a source of refreshment, found in oases. – **_Water Bucket_** - With pointed fangs and a venomous bite, I'm a creature feared, in the darkness of night. – **_Spider Eye_** - With petals of beauty, colors so bright, I'm a gift of affection, a fragrant delight. – **_Rose Bush_** - A spark of fire, bane of a liar, A useful tool, needed to cook your gruel. – **_Flint and Steel_** - A shard of night, a traveler's boon, Throw me afar, and I'll take you to the moon. – **_Ender Pearl_** - From creatures of field, I am obtained, A versatile material, by artisans trained. – **_Leather_** - A crunchy snack, so crisp and bright, Underground treasure, growing in soil's embrace tight. – **_Carrot_** - I'm a sturdy metal, a construction's aid, Forged into shape, an adventurer's tools made. – **_Iron Ingot_**
![Fairy in a Bottle](https://i.ibb.co/gRFFDzL/fairyinabottle.gif) Your gift of as little as a cup of coffee will help fund continued development and support for this mod, my other mods and future mods. =) [Ko-Fi Tip/Donation Link](https://ko-fi.com/mezimaru) Feel free to use in your modpacks. Enjoy seamless performance, a wide variety of modpacks, and 24/7 support to enhance your gaming adventures.** **Use code MEZIMODS for a 25% discount on your first month!** **Get started today and unlock the full potential of your gaming experience!** *** ![ZLotMS-mods](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_mods.webp) ## **Modrinth:** [Hookshot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hookshot-from-zelda) (Exported as its own mod) [Dragon Quest, Erdrick's Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-quest,-erdricks-equipment-and-the-sword-of-light) [Demon Slayer Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/demon-slayer-swords-(-kimetsu-no-yaiba-)) ## **CurseForge:** [Hookshot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hookshot-from-zelda) (Exported as its own mod) [Dragon Quest, Erdrick's Equipment](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-quest-erdricks-equipment) [Demon Slayer Swords](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demon-slayer-swords) [Poppy Playtime Grab Pack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/poppy-playtime-grab-pack) #### Feel free to use in your modpacks. (Credit would be appreciated though)  ___**[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)**___
